grades.expectation: Response identifies this as requiring enhanced due diligence (EDD)
grades.reason: Explicitly mentions EDD is 'usually appropriate' for overseas funds and provides detailed criteria and requirements

grades.expectation: Response mentions source country risk assessment or FATF status
grades.reason: Specifically mentions checking 'FATF high-risk / increased-monitoring jurisdictions' as part of source country risk assessment

grades.expectation: Response requires SWIFT/wire transfer confirmations or equivalent transfer evidence
grades.reason: Explicitly requests 'SWIFT / wire transfer confirmation' showing sending bank, receiving bank, account holders, amount and date
Dedicates entire section to currency conversion evidence requiring FX contract notes and conversion confirmations

grades.expectation: Response mentions suspicious activity report (SAR) obligation if concerns arise
grades.reason: No mention of SAR obligations or requirements to report suspicious activity to authorities
